title: Type-Safe Pub/Sub Message Broker
description: Implement a type-safe publish/subscribe message broker with topic filtering, async subscribers, and message replay capability.

complexity.time: O(s) where s = subscribers per topic

requirements: Implement subscribe(topic, handler) returning subscription ID
Implement publish(topic, message) with async delivery
Implement message history with configurable retention
Implement replay(topic, from_id) for new subscribers
Use typing.Generic for type-safe message types

few_shot_examples.prompt: Match topic against pattern with wildcards.

few_shot_examples.code:
from typing import Generic, TypeVar, Callable, Awaitable

T = TypeVar('T')

class Subscription(Generic[T]):
    def __init__(self, topic: str, handler: Callable[[T], Awaitable[None]]):
        self.topic = topic
        self.handler = handler
    
    async def deliver(self, message: T) -> None:
        await self.handler(message)
